# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Login to Docker Hub
        uses: docker/login-action@v1
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}

      - name: Build and push the Docker image
        run: |
          docker build -t my-app .
          docker tag my-app:latest ${GITHUB_ACTION}docker.pkg.github.com/${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/my-app:latest
          docker push ${GITHUB_ACTION}docker.pkg.github.com/${GITHUB_ACTOR}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/my-app:latest

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir build
          mvn clean install

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: my-app
          path: ./build/my-app.jar

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts
          path: ./src/main/deployment

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: config-files
          path: ./src/main/resources/config
